[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeVector](../../TextmodeVector.md) / mult

# Method: mult()

## Call Signature

```ts
mult(value): this;
```

Multiply this vector by a scalar.

### Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `value` | `number` | Scalar multiplier. |

### Returns

`this`

This vector.

### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" encoded-files="W3siaW5mbyI6Imh0bWwgaW5kZXguaHRtbCBbaGlkZGVuXSBbcmVhZG9ubHldIiwiY29kZSI6IjwhRE9DVFlQRSBodG1sPlxuPGh0bWwgbGFuZz1cImVuXCI-XG4gIDxoZWFkPlxuICAgIDxtZXRhIGNoYXJzZXQ9XCJ1dGYtOFwiIC8-XG4gICAgPG1ldGEgbmFtZT1cInZpZXdwb3J0XCIgY29udGVudD1cIndpZHRoPWRldmljZS13aWR0aCwgaW5pdGlhbC1zY2FsZT0xXCIgLz5cbiAgICA8dGl0bGU-bXVsdDwvdGl0bGU-XG4gICAgPHN0eWxlPlxuICAgICAgaHRtbCxcbiAgICAgIGJvZHkge1xuICAgICAgICBtYXJnaW46IDA7XG4gICAgICAgIG1pbi1oZWlnaHQ6IDEwMCU7XG4gICAgICAgIG92ZXJmbG93OiBoaWRkZW47XG4gICAgICAgIGJhY2tncm91bmQ6ICMwMDA7XG4gICAgICB9XG5cbiAgICAgIGNhbnZhcyB7XG4gICAgICAgIGRpc3BsYXk6IGJsb2NrO1xuICAgICAgfVxuICAgIDwvc3R5bGU-XG4gICAgPHNjcmlwdCBzcmM9XCJodHRwczovL3VucGtnLmNvbS90ZXh0bW9kZS5qc0AwLjE2LjAtYmV0YS4xL2Rpc3QvdGV4dG1vZGUudW1kLmpzXCI-PC9zY3JpcHQ-XG4gIDwvaGVhZD5cbiAgPGJvZHk-XG4gICAgPHNjcmlwdCB0eXBlPVwibW9kdWxlXCIgc3JjPVwic2tldGNoLmpzXCI-PC9zY3JpcHQ---IDI4KSB7XG5cdFx0dHJhaWwuc2hpZnQoKTtcblx0fVxuXG5cdGZvciAobGV0IGkgPSAwOyBpIDwgdHJhaWwubGVuZ3RoOyBpKyspIHtcblx0XHRjb25zdCBmYWRlID0gaSAvIHRyYWlsLmxlbmd0aDtcblx0XHRjb25zdCBnbHlwaCA9IGZhZGUgPiAwLjcyID8gJyonIDogZmFkZSA-" />

## Call Signature

```ts
mult(value): this;
```

Multiply this vector by vector-like components.

Missing components are treated as `1`.

### Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `value` | \| readonly `number`[] \| \| [`TextmodeVector`](../../TextmodeVector.md) \| \{ `x`: `number`; `y`: `number`; `z?`: `number`; \} | Vector-like value or component array to multiply by. |

### Returns

`this`

This vector.

### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" encoded-files="W3siaW5mbyI6Imh0bWwgaW5kZXguaHRtbCBbaGlkZGVuXSBbcmVhZG9ubHldIiwiY29kZSI6IjwhRE9DVFlQRSBodG1sPlxuPGh0bWwgbGFuZz1cImVuXCI-XG4gIDxoZWFkPlxuICAgIDxtZXRhIGNoYXJzZXQ9XCJ1dGYtOFwiIC8-XG4gICAgPG1ldGEgbmFtZT1cInZpZXdwb3J0XCIgY29udGVudD1cIndpZHRoPWRldmljZS13aWR0aCwgaW5pdGlhbC1zY2FsZT0xXCIgLz5cbiAgICA8dGl0bGU-bXVsdDwvdGl0bGU-XG4gICAgPHN0eWxlPlxuICAgICAgaHRtbCxcbiAgICAgIGJvZHkge1xuICAgICAgICBtYXJnaW46IDA7XG4gICAgICAgIG1pbi1oZWlnaHQ6IDEwMCU7XG4gICAgICAgIG92ZXJmbG93OiBoaWRkZW47XG4gICAgICAgIGJhY2tncm91bmQ6ICMwMDA7XG4gICAgICB9XG5cbiAgICAgIGNhbnZhcyB7XG4gICAgICAgIGRpc3BsYXk6IGJsb2NrO1xuICAgICAgfVxuICAgIDwvc3R5bGU-XG4gICAgPHNjcmlwdCBzcmM9XCJodHRwczovL3VucGtnLmNvbS90ZXh0bW9kZS5qc0AwLjE2LjAtYmV0YS4xL2Rpc3QvdGV4dG1vZGUudW1kLmpzXCI-PC9zY3JpcHQ-XG4gIDwvaGVhZD5cbiAgPGJvZHk-XG4gICAgPHNjcmlwdCB0eXBlPVwibW9kdWxlXCIgc3JjPVwic2tldGNoLmpzXCI-PC9zY3JpcHQ---IDI4KSB7XG5cdFx0dHJhaWwuc2hpZnQoKTtcblx0fVxuXG5cdGZvciAobGV0IGkgPSAwOyBpIDwgdHJhaWwubGVuZ3RoOyBpKyspIHtcblx0XHRjb25zdCBmYWRlID0gaSAvIHRyYWlsLmxlbmd0aDtcblx0XHRjb25zdCBnbHlwaCA9IGZhZGUgPiAwLjcyID8gJyonIDogZmFkZSA-" />

## Call Signature

```ts
mult(
   x, 
   y, 
   z?): this;
```

Multiply this vector by numeric components.

### Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `x` | `number` | X multiplier. |
| `y` | `number` | Y multiplier. |
| `z?` | `number` | Z multiplier. |

### Returns

`this`

This vector.

### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" encoded-files="W3siaW5mbyI6Imh0bWwgaW5kZXguaHRtbCBbaGlkZGVuXSBbcmVhZG9ubHldIiwiY29kZSI6IjwhRE9DVFlQRSBodG1sPlxuPGh0bWwgbGFuZz1cImVuXCI-XG4gIDxoZWFkPlxuICAgIDxtZXRhIGNoYXJzZXQ9XCJ1dGYtOFwiIC8-XG4gICAgPG1ldGEgbmFtZT1cInZpZXdwb3J0XCIgY29udGVudD1cIndpZHRoPWRldmljZS13aWR0aCwgaW5pdGlhbC1zY2FsZT0xXCIgLz5cbiAgICA8dGl0bGU-bXVsdDwvdGl0bGU-XG4gICAgPHN0eWxlPlxuICAgICAgaHRtbCxcbiAgICAgIGJvZHkge1xuICAgICAgICBtYXJnaW46IDA7XG4gICAgICAgIG1pbi1oZWlnaHQ6IDEwMCU7XG4gICAgICAgIG92ZXJmbG93OiBoaWRkZW47XG4gICAgICAgIGJhY2tncm91bmQ6ICMwMDA7XG4gICAgICB9XG5cbiAgICAgIGNhbnZhcyB7XG4gICAgICAgIGRpc3BsYXk6IGJsb2NrO1xuICAgICAgfVxuICAgIDwvc3R5bGU-XG4gICAgPHNjcmlwdCBzcmM9XCJodHRwczovL3VucGtnLmNvbS90ZXh0bW9kZS5qc0AwLjE2LjAtYmV0YS4xL2Rpc3QvdGV4dG1vZGUudW1kLmpzXCI-PC9zY3JpcHQ-XG4gIDwvaGVhZD5cbiAgPGJvZHk-XG4gICAgPHNjcmlwdCB0eXBlPVwibW9kdWxlXCIgc3JjPVwic2tldGNoLmpzXCI-PC9zY3JpcHQ---IDI4KSB7XG5cdFx0dHJhaWwuc2hpZnQoKTtcblx0fVxuXG5cdGZvciAobGV0IGkgPSAwOyBpIDwgdHJhaWwubGVuZ3RoOyBpKyspIHtcblx0XHRjb25zdCBmYWRlID0gaSAvIHRyYWlsLmxlbmd0aDtcblx0XHRjb25zdCBnbHlwaCA9IGZhZGUgPiAwLjcyID8gJyonIDogZmFkZSA-" />
